case_title: BUMB, GENEVA VS SMITH, ROBERT DEAN et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, ROBERT DEAN

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM.
